confidence_rationale: Clear view of all major phases and transfers. All objects appear properly placed on pegs. No visible drops or penalties observed. Timer clearly visible throughout.

technique_summary: Solid intermediate-level performance with proper technique adherence. Correct hand usage throughout both directions, clean transfers, and no visible penalties. Completion time of 114 seconds falls in intermediate range.
strengths: Proper sequence execution with correct hand usage
improvement_suggestions: Reduce overall time from 114s toward expert range (40-60s)
Practice faster object pickup and release to reduce phase transition times
Optimize instrument positioning to minimize travel distance
